title: Light Sabers
description: This datapack adds some cool-looking lightsabers from Star Wars. And yes, we call it Anakin's Lightsaber!
body:
[Mr3DAlien.net](http://mr3dalien.net 'http://mr3dalien.net') **|** [Discord](http://discord.mr3dalien.net 'http://discord.mr3dalien.net') **|** [Alien-Packs](https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks') **|** [Partners](https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners')
## Resource Pack Requirement

To fully utilize this datapack and ensure its proper functionality, it is mandatory to download and install the accompanying resource pack. The resource pack is an integral part of the gameplay and provides essential textures and audio assets required by the datapack.

Please download the [Required Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alien-packs) and install it before using the datapack. Without the resource pack, the datapack may not work as intended and you may miss out on crucial visual and audio elements.
# Light Sabers Datapack

## Description

Embark on an extraordinary journey through the galaxy with the *Light Sabers* Datapack. Immerse yourself in the immersive world of Star Wars within Minecraft as you wield a vast array of lightsabers, each possessing its own unique abilities and combat styles. Whether you choose to embrace the noble path of the Jedi or succumb to the seductive allure of the Sith, this datapack offers an unparalleled lightsaber experience.

**Key Features:**

- **Lightsaber Variety:** Discover an extensive collection of lightsabers, each meticulously crafted with its distinctive design and characteristics. From elegant and agile sabers to powerful and imposing blades, choose your weapon wisely to suit your combat preferences.
- **Force Abilities:** Tap into the power of the Force and unleash awe-inspiring abilities. Command the dark side as you force choke your enemies, or channel the light side to utilize telekinesis and manipulate objects at will. Let the Force guide your actions as you master these extraordinary powers.
- **Thrilling Combat:** Engage in intense lightsaber duels against formidable foes, testing your skill, agility, and mastery of the Force. Block, parry, and strike with precision as you engage in epic battles, reenacting iconic moments from the Star Wars universe.
